zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Sayn於大約1185年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽時，她的父親Heinrich II. von Sayn32歲，母親Agnes von Saffenberg28歲。她於1202年與Gottfried III. von Sponheim結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年11月22日在德國海藍-普法爾茲堂納斯波可萊斯吉海波藍登享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Sayn于大约1185年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽时，她的父亲Heinrich II. von Sayn32岁，母亲Agnes von Saffenberg28岁。她于1202年与Gottfried III. von Sponheim结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年11月22日在德国海藍-普法爾茲堂納斯波可萊斯吉海波藍登享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sayn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from a derivative of saymak ‘to respect’, interpreted as ‘respectful’.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Sayn was born about 1185, in Sayn, Bendorf, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Heinrich II. von Sayn, was 32 and her mother, Agnes von Saffenberg, was 28. She married Gottfried III. von Sponheim in 1202. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 November 1263, in Kirchheimbolanden, Donnersbergkreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Sayn est née environ 1185, à Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich II. von Sayn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Saffenberg, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Gottfried III. von Sponheim en 1202. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1263, à Kirchheimbolanden, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Sayn um 1185 in Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich II. von Sayn 32 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Saffenberg 28. Sie hat 1202 Gottfried III. von Sponheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. November 1263 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Kirchheimbolanden, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Sayn è nata il circa 1185 nel Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich II. von Sayn, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Saffenberg, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Gottfried III. von Sponheim nel 1202. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 novembre 1263, nel Kirchheimbolanden, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Sayn(이)가 대략 1185년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 메이-코블렌즈 벤도르프 지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich II. von Sayn(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Saffenberg(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1202년 Gottfried III. von Sponheim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 11월 22일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 도너스버그크레이스 커ch하임볼랜든에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Sayn nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich II. von Sayn, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Saffenberg, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Gottfried III. von Sponheim em 1202. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1263, em Kirchheimbolanden, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Sayn родилась около 1185 г. в местности сеин, бендорф, ландкрис меиен-кобленц, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich II. von Sayn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Saffenberg, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gottfried III. von Sponheim в 1202 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 ноября 1263 г. в местности кирчхимболанден, доннирсбиргкрис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Sayn nació aproximadamente 1185, en Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich II. von Sayn, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes von Saffenberg, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gottfried III. von Sponheim en 1202. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1263, en Kirchheimbolanden, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 79 años.
